name: Alvro Bair Taylor
researcher_question: Whom did Alvro Bair Taylor marry, and when and where did the marriage take place?
notes: Starting tree is the subject plus both parents (spouse stripped). The subject's own sources (1940 census, 1940 obituaries, Find A Grave, Oregon death records) point to a surviving widow, but the marriage event itself must be recovered from an Oregon marriage record. Snapshot carries a harmless cross-person duplicate fact id (Birth 248eaba5 on subject+both parents; Death 9381f219 on subject+father) that is per-holder unique so validate passes; likely a snapshot normalizer quirk worth a look.
